meta.title: How It Works — Earn Money With Surveys | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: From sign-up to payout: see exactly how InsightPanel matches you with surveys, pays fair rewards, and cashes you out the same day.
meta.ogAlt: How InsightPanel works, from opinion to payout

hero.subtitle: Participate in exclusive B2B research opportunities tailored to your professional experience. Share valuable insights, influence business decisions, and receive rewards for your contribution. Here's exactly how it works.

steps.title: Build Your Professional Profile
steps.text: Complete your professional profile so we can connect you with research studies that match your expertise.

steps.title: Get Matched with Studies
steps.text: Receive invitations to research studies that align with your industry experience and professional background.

steps.title: Share Your Expertise
steps.text: Participate in relevant research opportunities and share your professional insights through surveys, interviews, and other research activities.

steps.title: Receive Reward
steps.text: Reward lands in your balance the same day. Cash out via UPI, PayPal, or bank transfer from just $5.

items.title: UPI / PayPal — Same day
items.text: Sent to your UPI ID or PayPal account

items.title: Bank transfer — 1–2 days
items.text: Direct to your account, zero fees

cta.title: Ready to share your expertise?
cta.subtitle: Join a trusted community of professionals participating in exclusive research opportunities and helping shape business decisions.

answer.question: Which cloud platforms does your organization currently use?
